context.role: Aerial obstacle that player must duck under or time jump to avoid
context.screen_position: Spawns at x=650px (screen_width + 50), y=50px (Low variant) or y=80px (High variant), scrolls left at Current_Speed
context.usage_scenario: Mid-game obstacle appearing after 200 points, requires ducking (Low variant at 50px) or can be passed under (High variant at 80px), 30-40% spawn probability after threshold

visual_specification.shape: Pteranodon-style flying dinosaur with long beak and extended wings
visual_specification.outline: 2px solid outline included in sprite dimensions

animation.description: Wing flapping animation - Frame 1: wings raised upward, Frame 2: wings lowered downward. Seamless loop creates continuous flying motion.

visual_specification.details: Long pointed beak, extended wings in flight pose, body in horizontal flying position, tail extended, wing flapping creates sense of movement

relationships.shared_with: Same color scheme as all other obstacles
relationships.differences_from: Only aerial obstacle (spawns at y=50px or y=80px vs ground level y=0px), only obstacle with animation (10 FPS wing flap), requires ducking instead of jumping for Low variant, appears only after 200 points unlike cacti which appear from start

explicit_negations: No vertical bobbing or wave motion
No smooth wing transition (hard frame switch only)
